Document:
# Detective
- 1.
 Standard [color=#00a933]Code Green[/color] equipment is:
in
- 2.
 The Detective inherits their duties, clearances and responsibilities from the Security Officer when their own SOP does not apply. - 3.
 The Detective is responsible for the investigation of crime-scenes. - 4.
 The Detective is responsible for interrogation of prisoners and detainees if necessary.

 4.1
 Any time spent in interrogation is to be subtracted from the subject's confinement time. - 5.
 The Detective is permitted to ignore the Uniform Requirements in Security SOP §2 with approval from the Head of Security.

 5.1
 This is only allowed for purposes of undercover investigation.

 5.2
 The Detective's real ID must remain somewhere on their person at all times despite this.
